lines: Five days. Ten envelopes. A story written for you alone.
Each morning and each evening, a sealed letter arrives.
Your choices shape every word of it.
Read when I send. Answer honestly. Do completely.,
I am always watching. I already know which one you'll reach for.

days.title: The Literary Tease
days.theme: Intellectual arousal and building the mental stage.

envelopes.label: The Package
envelopes.intro: You arrive to find a small package waiting. Inside are three choices—three different paths, each with a distinct reminder of how you are mine.

choices.title: The Necklace
choices.hint: Worn constantly at your throat

card.heading: A Mark Around Your Neck
card.body:
A slim chain descends to rest against your collarbone, its weight a whisper against your skin. At its center hangs a singular 'M' - Mine. It catches light when you move, glints when you turn your head, announces itself in photographs and mirrors. You'll feel it always: a cool pressure that tightens with each breath, a constant reminder of who owns you.

This isn't adornment. This is a collar. For five days, you wear it without hesitation or removal. Every glance in the mirror confirms your status. Every interaction reminds you that you're marked, claimed, and completely mine. It becomes part of you—and you become more completely mine.",
card.rule: You will wear this necklace at all times for five consecutive days without removing it once.

choices.title: The Bracelet
choices.hint: Your pulse, my mark

card.heading: Bound at the Wrist
card.body:
A slim bracelet, deceptively simple. Inside, an engraved initial -mine -rests against your skin where your pulse beats. A secret only we share.

No one else will see it. But you will feel it with every gesture, every reach, every moment of your day. It will catch the light when you move. It will remind you, constantly and inevitably, that you are marked. That you are claimed. That for these five days, your wrist carries the proof of who you belong to.This is not adornment. This is ownership made tangible.
card.rule: Wear the bracelet continuously for five days without removal.

choices.title: The Silk Ribbon
choices.hint: Wrist or neck—your collar of choice

card.heading: Mark of Possession
card.body:
Deep crimson silk, supple against your skin. You choose where it rests—delicate around your wrist, or claimed around your neck. Either way, it stays. Five days. No removal.

Everyone will notice. They'll wonder. You'll know the truth: you're marked. You're mine. Every glance in the mirror, every moment someone's eyes linger on that ribbon, you'll feel the weight of what it means. Not ownership - possession. There's a difference. This isn't decoration. It's a daily oath written in silk.
card.rule: Wear this ribbon continuously for five days without removal. Choose where you place it.

envelopes.label: The Setting
envelopes.intro: The 'M' you've chosen is now against your skin. It's going to stay there for five days. Tonight, you just need to find the perfect place to read. Somewhere comfortable. Somewhere you can lose yourself in the story.

choices.title: The Couch
choices.hint: Soft lighting, quiet house, just you

card.heading: Settle In
card.body:
This moment is entirely about you. Sink into the couch—arrange the pillows, pull the blanket close, find that exact position where comfort meets perfect stillness. The soft lighting wraps around you, the house holds its breath, and everything else falls away.

You're marked. You're mine. And right now, you're exactly where you need to be. Read at your own pace. Let the story take you completely. I'll be here, close enough to know you're safe, far enough to let this be your sanctuary. Feel yourself relax into it - the words, the quiet, the weight of what we've started. This is yours to enjoy. This is where it all begins.
card.rule: Get comfortable on the couch and read undisturbed for as long as you need.

inputs.label: What do you hope for tomorrow?

choices.title: The Bed
choices.hint: Settle in completely, all to yourself

card.heading: Your sanctuary awaits
card.body: The bedroom is yours alone tonight. Stretch across the bed however feels best—completely relaxed, completely comfortable. This is your space to surrender to the story, undisturbed and unhurried.\n\nI want you to enjoy this. Every word, every moment. Let yourself sink into the narrative, calm and at ease. You deserve this time. And when you've had enough, when you're ready, come find me. I'll be waiting to hear what moved you, what you felt, what you're already craving for tomorrow.
card.rule: Retreat to the bedroom. Read at your own pace, undisturbed. Return when you're satisfied.

inputs.label: What do you hope for tomorrow?

choices.title: The Patio
choices.hint: Fresh air, solitude, complete calm

card.heading: The Patio
card.body:
The patio stretches out before you—open air, soft ground beneath your feet, the world held at a distance. This is your space. A chair waiting. The sky as your only company.

I want you relaxed here. Calm. Lost in the story and nothing else. This is about you—your pleasure, your pace, your surrender to what the pages will do to you.

When you're finished reading, come back inside. Find me. Let me see what it's taken from you.
card.rule: Go to the patio and read undisturbed until complete. Then come find me.

inputs.label: What do you hope for tomorrow?

dayPrelude.heading: Before Day 1 Begins
dayPrelude.body: A brief, beautiful lead-in for this day. Use it to set mood, location, or emotional tension before the first envelope opens.

days.title: Digital Voyeurism
days.theme: Visual longing and the psychological weight of being watched.

envelopes.label: The Gift
envelopes.intro:
You wake to flowers waiting for you. A dozen of them—chosen specifically because I know what you like. They sit on the counter, beautiful and deliberate.

But that's not all. There's also a package. Unmarked. When you open it, you'll understand immediately what it is. 

The flowers are a promise. The package is a preview of what's coming.

choices.title: The Luxury Toy
choices.hint: Designed for pleasure, positioned for connection

card.heading: The Luxury Toy
card.body: The vibrator I sent is high-end and precisely engineered—a gift that knows exactly what you need. It builds slowly, deliberately, designed to take you exactly where I want you to go.\n\nKeep it close all day. Think about it. Feel the weight of it in your hand. Tonight at 9:00, I want you to use it for me on camera. Use the phone stand I included—place it so I can see your face, nothing else. Let me watch you surrender to the pleasure I'm giving you from a distance. That's where my control lives: in the intimacy of being seen by me, completely.
card.rule: Keep it close all day. Tonight at 9:00 PM sharp, use it on camera with the phone stand positioned on your face only.

choices.title: The Versatile Companion
choices.hint: Your hands, your control, twice

card.heading: The Versatile Companion
card.body:
This one is different—you control everything. The rhythm, the speed, the intensity. It responds to every touch of your hands.

Keep it close all day. Feel its weight, its potential. There's a stand for the phone too—use it. Position it so I can see only your face as you touch yourself.

By 9:00 PM, you'll be ready. And since you didn't choose the other option, you're going twice for me tonight. Your hands, your pleasure, twice. I'll be watching every expression as you give yourself to me on camera.
card.rule: Keep it with you all day. At 9:00 PM sharp, use the stand for your phone focused on your face only. Touch yourself twice on camera for me.

envelopes.choicesIntro: You hold the weight of my gift in your hands. The question isn't whether you'll use it—it's when, and how you'll let me know.

choices.title: The Confession
choices.hint: Let me hear you

card.heading: The Confession
card.body:
I want to hear you. Not screaming—I want to hear your breath change. The small sounds you make when you're close. Whispered words if they come. I'm watching your face, listening to every nuance of how the toy affects you.

Talk to me. Tell me what you're feeling. Make me hear how much you need this. The words are mine to collect.
card.rule: Talk to me. Let me hear every breath, every word. Nothing is too much.

choices.title: The Silence
choices.hint: Your face tells me everything

card.heading: The Silence
card.body:
Don't speak. Just let me watch. Your face tells me everything—when you're building, when you're close, the exact moment you lose control.

I'm reading every expression. Every flutter of your eyes. Every time your breath catches. By the time you finish, I'll know your body better than you do—because I'll have memorized exactly how your face responds to every sensation.
card.rule: Don't speak. Let your face do everything. I'll be watching every detail.

dayPrelude.heading: Before Day 2 Begins
dayPrelude.body: A brief, beautiful lead-in for this day. Use it to set mood, location, or emotional tension before the first envelope opens.

days.title: The Edge of Control
days.theme: Kink, sensory play, and the frustration of restraint.

envelopes.label: The Restraint Choice
envelopes.intro:
You know what tonight means. You know what waits for you in the dark, what your body will surrender to. But before the evening unfolds, one decision belongs entirely to you.

One choice. After that, control shifts.

choices.title: The Silk Restraints
choices.hint: Luxurious, inescapable

card.heading: The Silk Restraints
card.body:
Soft silk ties around your wrists and ankles. Gentle, but completely secure. When I blindfold you, the silk will be the only thing you feel besides my hands. Luxurious. Intimate. Inescapable.

All day, imagine how the silk will feel when I bind you. By tonight, you'll be desperate to feel it against your skin.
card.rule: Spend the day imagining the silk against your wrists. Tell me when you're ready.

choices.title: The Leather Cuffs
choices.hint: Heavy, professional, permanent

card.heading: The Leather Cuffs
card.body:
Real leather cuffs. Professional. Heavy. When I lock them around your wrists and ankles, you'll feel the weight of them. The permanence. The absolute certainty that you're not going anywhere.

All day, know that by tonight, these cuffs will define your boundaries. By the time I put them on, you'll be ready to surrender completely.
card.rule: Spend the day thinking about the weight of them. Tell me when you're ready.

choices.title: The Handcuffs
choices.hint: Cold, hard, no ambiguity

card.heading: The Handcuffs
card.body:
Metal handcuffs. Cold. Hard. The sound they make when I secure them is the last warning you get. This is real restraint. This is control.

Imagine the weight of them. The click of the lock. The absolute certainty that your hands belong to me. All day, that thought builds. By tonight, you'll be begging me to put them on.
card.rule: Spend the day thinking about that sound. Tell me when you're ready.

envelopes.choicesIntro: Your restraint will be chosen now—but its purpose remains unspoken. What matters is what you can endure, what will make your skin burn with anticipation as the hours stretch forward.

envelopes.label: The Surrender
envelopes.intro: The restraints you chose this morning are ready. The blindfold is waiting. And you know exactly what's about to happen to you.

choices.title: The Binding
choices.hint: Blindfolded and completely at my mercy

card.heading: The Binding
card.body:
I'm blindfolding you first. Complete darkness. Then I'm securing the restraints you chose—silk, leather, or metal binding your wrists and ankles, leaving you helpless and exposed.

You're going to your knees. Your mouth is mine now. I'm going to use you until I decide you're done—your lips, your tongue, nothing else. No hands. No touching me any other way. Just your mouth, working for me, taking whatever I give you.

You can't see. You can't move freely. You can only obey. And you're going to feel every second of your own powerlessness as I take exactly what I want from you.
card.rule: Mouth only. No hands. No other touching. You move only when I direct you to move.

choices.title: The Submission
choices.hint: On your back, hands bound, completely mine

card.heading: The Submission
card.body:
You're on your back. The restraints you chose this morning bind your wrists to the headboard. The blindfold covers your eyes completely.

I spread your legs and settle between them. My mouth finds your pussy, and I own it. Every lick, every suck, every breath is mine to control. You can't touch me—your hands are locked away, unable to move. Your eyes are covered, blind to everything but the building sensation.

I decide when you come. Once. Twice. Maybe not at all. Your pleasure exists only because I allow it. You exist only because I'm using you right now.
card.rule: On your back, hands restrained. Do not touch me. You may cum only twice. Remain still unless I move you.

dayPrelude.heading: Before Day 3 Begins
dayPrelude.body: A brief, beautiful lead-in for this day. Use it to set mood, location, or emotional tension before the first envelope opens.

days.title: Elegance & Inhibition
days.theme: High-class presentation and the power of restricted intimacy.

envelopes.label: The Dress
envelopes.intro:
A package arrives at your door. You open it carefully, curious what's inside—but first, there's an envelope with your name on it. Inside, a single instruction: Open the rest when you're alone.

You do. And there it is—something beautiful, waiting for you. Something that's been chosen with you in mind. There's a note tucked beneath: *Wear this today. All day. Make yourself stunning. Tonight belongs to us.*

There's more in the envelope too—another secret, tucked away. One you'll discover when you're ready. But first, know this: Pack your bags. Not for here. For La Paloma. For the ocean. For two days with just me and what we've built over these five days. Bring your gift. Don't forget it. Everything else can stay behind.

choices.title: The Red Silk
choices.hint: Bold, unapologetic, utterly captivating

card.heading: The Red Silk
card.body:
A deep crimson gown that announces you without a word. Unforgiving. Exquisite. The kind of dress that makes you feel like every inch of you is exactly where it should be—seen, appreciated, claimed.

You'll get ready for this dress, not the other way around. Full makeup. Hair done. Heels that make you walk differently. The silk clings where it matters, whispers against your skin all day long. Every movement reminds you that you're dressed this way because I want the world to see what's mine—and then tonight, I'll show you what that really means.

You wear this until I take it off.
card.rule: Wear this dress, fully styled with heels and makeup, from the moment you put it on until the moment we're alone tonight. Do not remove it. Do not change. Do not diminish what you look like in it.

choices.title: The Black Elegance
choices.hint: Wear it all day. Let him watch you become his.

card.heading: The Black Elegance
card.body:
This is how I want to see you today—dressed in every detail I've chosen. Black silk that fits like a secret. Heels that make you walk like you know exactly what you do to me. Hair, makeup, all of it—complete. Untouchable to everyone but me.

Wear it from morning through night. Feel the weight of my attention on you all day long. Every glance in the mirror reminds you that you're mine. By the time we leave for La Paloma, you'll understand: this elegance you're wearing, it's how I see you. It's what you are to me. And tonight, I'll show you exactly why I chose this for you.

Don't change. Don't cover it. Let yourself be seen—as beautiful as I know you are.",
<parameter name="rule">Wear the complete outfit all day without changing or covering it. Full hair, makeup, and heels included. This is non-negotiable.
card.rule: Wear this all day. Do not change. Do not cover it up.

choices.title: The Emerald Dream
choices.hint: Rare, precious, a statement

card.heading: The Emerald Dream
card.body:
Rich, luxurious, jewel-toned emerald that catches the light like a secret only we share. This dress is a statement—one that says you're mine, that you belong to me, that everyone who sees you tonight will know you're the most beautiful thing in the world.

I want you transformed. Heels that elongate every line. Makeup that accentuates every feature I've memorized. Hair arranged the way I see it in my mind. The whole thing—every detail crafted to make you feel the way I see you. Radiant. Powerful. Undeniable.

Wear it all day. Let it be the only thing you change into. Let it be what you wear when you move through the world, knowing you're wearing something I chose for you. By tonight, when you arrive at La Paloma, you'll be glowing—and I'll be waiting to see exactly what's underneath.
card.rule: Wear this dress all day without changing or covering it. Complete the look: heels, full makeup, hair styled. Do not remove it until tonight.

envelopes.choicesIntro: You stand before what's been left for you, feeling the weight of intention behind every detail. The choice is yours—but it's not really a choice at all, is it? It's what happens when someone knows exactly what they want you to become.

envelopes.label: The Kiss
envelopes.intro:
You're standing there in the dress. Hair done. Makeup perfect. You look beautiful. He's looking at you like he's been waiting for this moment all day.

"Pick a number. Fifteen. Twenty. Thirty. That's how many minutes we're going to kiss. Nothing else. Just this. Just us. Just your mouth and mine, and the clock counting down."

No sex. No hands wandering. Just kissing—slow, deep, thorough, completely consuming.

choices.title: Fifteen Minutes
choices.hint: Long enough to feel like forever

card.heading: Fifteen Minutes
card.body:
Fifteen minutes is an eternity when it's just kissing. Long enough to feel like forever. Short enough to leave you desperate for more when the time is up.

We'll kiss until the timer runs out. Then we stop. And you'll spend the rest of the night thinking about what you didn't get.
card.rule: Set a timer for fifteen minutes. No hands. Only kissing. When it ends, we stop.

choices.title: Twenty Minutes
choices.hint: Long enough for everything to change

card.heading: Twenty Minutes
card.body:
Twenty minutes. Long enough to find a rhythm. Long enough for your breathing to change, for your body to respond, for the kiss to become the entire world.

Just kissing. Nothing more. But by the end, you'll feel like you've given me everything.
card.rule: Set a timer for twenty minutes. No hands. Only kissing. When it ends, we stop.

choices.title: Thirty Minutes
choices.hint: A lifetime in half an hour

card.heading: Thirty Minutes
card.body:
Thirty minutes. A lifetime compressed into half an hour. Just your lips and mine. No rush. No destination. Just the infinite slow burn of kissing someone you want completely.

By the end, you'll understand exactly what restraint means. And you'll be aching for what comes next.
card.rule: Set a timer for thirty minutes. No hands. Only kissing. When it ends, we stop.

dayPrelude.heading: Before Day 4 Begins
dayPrelude.body: A brief, beautiful lead-in for this day. Use it to set mood, location, or emotional tension before the first envelope opens.

envelopes.label: The Design
envelopes.intro:
This is the last day. Tonight, there are no more rules. No more restraint. And you get to decide how far we go.

Pick one: Do you want me to decide everything, or do you want to design it?

choices.title: You Decide
choices.hint: Complete surrender, total trust

card.heading: You Decide
card.body:
I'm taking control of all of it. I'm choosing the toys, the intensity, the positions, what happens to you, and where I finish. You don't get to negotiate. You just get to surrender completely to exactly what I want to do with you.

Trust me. By the end of the night, you'll understand why this was the right choice.
card.rule: You've surrendered the right to decide. Trust me completely. Say nothing except yes.

choices.title: I'll Design It
choices.hint: Your perfect night, built by you

card.heading: I'll Design It
card.body:
You get to build your perfect night. Tell me exactly what you want.

Fill this out:
- What's your name for this? (What do you call what you want to happen?)
- Sexy toys: (Which toys are we using tonight?)
- Something new: (Pick one: Anal, Throat Fucking, or Paint)
- Types of restraints: (Silk, Leather, Handcuffs, or None)
- How many rounds: (How many times do we go?)
- Where I cum: (Where do you want it? Inside you, on you, in your mouth, on your face?)

Design your perfect ending. Then watch it happen exactly the way you imagined it.
card.rule: Fill out every field. Be honest. Be specific. This is your night — own it.

inputs.label: Sexy toys
inputs.placeholder: Which toys are we using tonight?

envelopes.label: The Aftermath
envelopes.intro: The final night. Everything you've built over four days comes to this. There's no stopping now.

choices.title: The Primal Hunt
choices.hint: No restraint, no softness, pure intensity

card.heading: The Primal Hunt
card.body:
The second the door closes, we're done with restraint. Clothes become obstacles and then casualties. Forgotten on the floor.

We're not using the bed. The kitchen counter, the shower, the hallway, the rug—everywhere. No comfort, no softness. Just pure, unfiltered intensity. Raw. Animalistic. Complete.

By the time we're finished, you won't remember what hesitation felt like. You'll only remember the moment you stopped thinking and started just feeling.
card.rule: No stopping. No negotiating. This is what you chose. Give me everything.

choices.title: The Marathon
choices.hint: Hours, until neither of us can move

card.heading: The Marathon
card.body:
We don't stop. Not until we're both completely exhausted. Hours. The kind of intensity that doesn't have a beginning or an end, just an endless middle of switching between me taking total control and you taking what you need from me.

Dominance and submission trading places. Your body and mine, over and over, until neither of us can move. Until the sun starts coming up and we're both breathing hard, completely wrung out, completely satisfied.

This is the culmination of five days. This is what happens when there are no more boundaries.
card.rule: No limits. No end until we both say so. This is what five days of waiting was for.

dayPrelude.heading: Before Day 5 Begins
dayPrelude.body: A brief, beautiful lead-in for this day. Use it to set mood, location, or emotional tension before the first envelope opens.

epilogue.title: Thursday Morning
epilogue.text:
The house is quiet. The weekend is over. She's sleeping, marked in ways she'll feel with every movement for the next few days. You're already thinking about next time.

Because now she knows exactly how far this can go.

And you're both counting the days until you can start again.
